g.text: ← from tool result aggregator (diagram 1)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the summarizer extract dynamic facts from a conversation turn?')
g.text: Summarizer / fact extractor
Dedicated LLM call · extracts dynamic facts as JSON delta
e.g. "user has type 2 diabetes · runs 30 min daily"

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the response synthesizer merge outputs from multiple domain agents?')
g.text: Response synthesizer
Merges nutrition + fitness + medical outputs into single response
Applies domain attributions · resolves contradictions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the constraint validator prevent unsafe suggestions like sweets for a diabetic?')
g.text: Constraint validator
Checks response against user profile constraint rules
Blocks unsafe suggestions before streaming to client

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the response streamed back to the client?')
g.text: Stream response to client
SSE / WebSocket · Supabase Realtime for tool progress

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the memory write node persist to Mem0, pgvector and the user profile?')
g.text: Memory write node
Write turn to Supabase messages · update Mem0 semantic store
Apply profile delta · publish fact events to Kafka

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is idempotency guaranteed with LangGraph checkpointing?')
g.text: LangGraph checkpointer · Redis
Persists graph state after every node · idempotency keys per turn
Pod crash recovery: any pod resumes any session

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What gets written to the tool call audit log?')
g.text: Tool call audit log · Supabase
Every tool call: user_id · tool_name · args · result · OTEL trace_id
→ memory layer (diagram 3)
